entries.title: Explore each customer’s work
entries.description: Customer pages now include dedicated tabs for quotes and jobs, making it easier to review their activity.

entries.title: Discover key product features
entries.description: The product’s key features now have a clearer, more spacious presentation.

entries.title: Chat with the Assistant
entries.description: Use the Assistant from the mobile app to ask questions and get help on the go.

entries.title: Navigate comfortably on Android
entries.description: Content and controls now stay clear of Android’s bottom navigation area.
